microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a 2-person operation into a **platformized system**, standardizing API-driven workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise partners including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining PRDs and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned drill execution to a scalable, partner-adoptable model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**—surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous-validation standard across the infrastructure stack.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, coordinating across compliance, legal, and operations in a regulated environment.

Tracked post-GA adoption metrics—partner activation rates, exception rates, and drill success ratios—iterating on rollout sequencing and tooling until **production usage targets** were consistently met across all enrolled partner surfaces.

Scaled team leverage through AI-native workflows, building an internal AI agent using LLM-powered tools to restructure planning cycles, reducing cycle time by **39%** and increasing drill throughput capacity by 21%.
microsoft_2023: Championed **API-driven product adoption** for AI code generation workflows, conducting partner demos and training sessions that drove utilization across 14 key engineering teams and saved **37 engineering hours** monthly.

Shaped the product roadmap to include intent-based YAML generation by running 11+ discovery interviews with Azure service teams, translating integration constraints into a **sequenced backlog** of high-priority developer-facing features.

Improved data retrieval and developer experience by migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search platform with rigorous metadata standards, cutting partner lookup time by **83%** and reducing onboarding friction.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework spanning 140+ teams and multiple broker-equivalent operational surfaces.

Ran discovery with 20+ service teams to map **81 hours of manual toil** per region launch, then built and socialized a phased roadmap to automate critical paths—directly informing backlog prioritization and engineering API contracts.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** to track operational toil and exception rates across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to surface automation gaps and target high-impact support investments with data-backed tradeoff analysis.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot by defining the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and aligning IT, Operations, and Engineering on a sequenced rollout plan.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, managing a prioritized backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize the developer intake and partner integration process.

Drove cross-functional alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement automated **CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing exception-handling overhead for production releases.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end proposal and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly engagements via a new CRM process, improving partner-facing operational efficiency and reducing manual exceptions.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversion rates by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy—optimizing the website, Google profile, and partner activation funnel to improve downstream adoption.

Improved leadership pricing decisions by conducting financial profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records**, identifying margin leaks and building a data-backed model to guide rollout sequencing and resource tradeoffs.
